mapper.insert: INSERT INTO excel_import_job (job_id, file_name, status, executed_by, total_count, success_count, error_count, created_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{fileName}, #{status}, #{executedBy}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{errorCount}, #{createdAt}, #{finishedAt})
INSERT INTO excel_import_error (job_id, row_number, field, message, created_at) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{rowNumber}, #{field}, #{message}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT error_id, job_id, row_number, field, message, created_at FROM excel_import_error WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY row_number
